SEQUENCE.COMMENT: fixBadMimeData - this service will correct some of the bad mime formats that we've seen from some mail
providers so that we can keep the createMimeData call from failing
this section is simple replacements of bad mime data

INVOKE.COMMENT: Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64 => Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary; origenc=base64 (see mimedocToEmaildoc)

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this section will decode any =?utf-8?B?QHiOFJmbcIJ?= sections within the mimeMsg

MAP.COMMENT: start by setting the mimeMsg to mimePieces[0]

LOOP.COMMENT: then loop over any of multiple embedded encoding references in the Subject

BRANCH.COMMENT: skip the first entry, which we captured above as mimePieces[0]

INVOKE.COMMENT: ?= note that this has a split limit of 2 so that we can capture any trailing data
